formula: G3P = (max(Glucose, 0.01) * max(Glycerol, 0.01) * max(Xylose, 0.01) * max(PGI, 0.01) * max(PPS, 0.01) * max(EDD, 0.01) * max(EDA, 0.01))^(1/7) * min(1/max(ZWF * GAPA * DXS, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply

Pyruvate = (max(Glucose, 0.01) * max(Xylose, 0.01) * max(PGI, 0.01) * max(PYKA, 0.01) * max(PYKF, 0.01) * max(EDD, 0.01) * max(EDA, 0.01))^(1/7) * min(1/max(PPS * LDH * DXS, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Acetyl_CoA = max(ACEE, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(PTA * PPC, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Mevalonate = (max(Acetyl_CoA, 0.01) * max(ATOB, 0.01) * max(HMGS, 0.01) * max(HMGR, 0.01) * max(NADPH, 0.01))^(1/5) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
IPP = (max(DXS, 0.01) * max(G3P, 0.01) * max(Pyruvate, 0.01) * max(Mevalonate, 0.01) * max(MVK, 0.01) * max(MVD, 0.01) * max(DXR, 0.01))^(1/7) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
FPP = (max(ISPA, 0.01) * max(IPP, 0.01) * max(DMAPP, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(ISPB, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
ROS = max(Oxygen_Level, 0.01)^(1/1) * min(1/max(KATE * Lycopene_Titer, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
IDI = (max(NRI, 0.01) * max(IPTG, 0.01) * max(Arabinose, 0.01) * max(Plasmid_Copy_Number, 0.01))^(1/4) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
MVK = (max(Plasmid_Copy_Number, 0.01) * max(ATP, 0.01))^(1/2) * min(1/max(GPP * FPP * GGPP, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
Lycopene_Titer = (max(CRTI, 0.01) * max(Phytoene, 0.01) * max(MEMBRANE_STORAGE, 0.01))^(1/3) * min(1/max(Temperature * ROS * ENVELOPE_STRESS, 0.1), 10.0) * gene_modifier + exogenous_supply
